3068050.name: Blood Within: Path of Vengeance
3068050.description:
Discover What Happened
Experience what Valu'ur went through before the Star lost its power and accompany him in his grief-stricken life.

Fast and Ruthless Battles
Follow the Path and reach the peak of agility to become as swift as Death itself.

Hidden Paths and Puzzles
Keep an eye on dark corners to find various rewards or pieces of the story.

New Skills, Different Combat Styles
Adapt to the environment with a brand new set of gameplay, realize your power, and seal the fate of anyone who stands in the Path.

Stronger Enemies and Bosses
The enemies are more ruthless and smarter than ever before.
